zh.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston是Roger De Dudmaston的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston是Roger De Dudmaston的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of   Hugh  , used throughout the Middle Ages in official documents, and now enjoying a revival as a given name.

en.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston was born as the son of Roger De Dudmaston. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston est né, fils de Roger De Dudmaston. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston wurde, als Sohn von Roger De Dudmaston geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston è nato il come figlio di Roger De Dudmaston. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugo De DudmastonはRoger De Dudmastonの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston(은)는 Roger De Dudmaston의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston nasceu filho de Roger De Dudmaston. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston родился. Его отца звали Roger De Dudmaston. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Hugo De Dudmaston nació como hijo de Roger De Dudmaston. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
